mission.title: antrea: Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images
mission.description: Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current antrea deployment
steps.description:
Verify your antrea version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
helm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working antrea installation.

steps.title: Review antrea configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea
```
As we already remove the support on Docker runtime on Windows since Antrea v2.0, we could assume that antrea-agent is running as a host process container on Windows Node using Containerd runtime ( we

steps.title: Apply the fix for Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images
steps.description:
The changes in this patch include,
1. Use Windows hpc as the base image to store Antrea binary and OVS files
2. Use doocker buildx to build Windows image on Linux base environment
3. Modify OVS init container to install redist files
4. Place openssl dll files into OVS binary directory instead of
```yaml
--cache-to type=registry,ref=$image-cache:$BUILD_TAG,mode=max
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Use buildx and hpc image to build Antrea Windows images" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
The changes in this patch include,
1. Use Windows hpc as the base image to store Antrea binary and OVS files
2. Use doocker buildx to build Windows image on Linux base environment
3. Modify OVS init container to install redist files
4. Place openssl dll files into OVS binary directory instead of Windows system
    path
5.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with antrea installed or the issue environment reproducible.
